description: Create the complete DMS telemetry receiver architecture: versioned contract types, receiver interface, WebSocket receiver, Dummy receiver, Replay receiver, factory, validation, adapter, and updated hook. This is a single coherent unit since all pieces depend on each other and together form the integration layer.
steps: Create src/types/dmsTelemetryContract.ts with all interfaces: DmsTelemetryMessage (schemaVersion, source, timestampMs, frameId, fps, connection, driverState, scores, headPose, gaze, eyes, behaviour, vehicle, adasFusion), ConnectionStatus, DriverStateOutput, DmsScores, HeadPoseTelemetry, GazeTelemetry, EyeTelemetry, BehaviourTelemetry, VehicleTelemetry, AdasFusionTelemetry. Use exact field names and types from the user specification. All scores 0.0-1.0 unless explicitly named as ms/deg/sec/kph.

Create src/services/receivers/DmsTelemetryReceiver.ts with the DmsTelemetryReceiver interface (connect(): Promise<void>, disconnect(): void, isConnected(): boolean, subscribe(callback): unsubscribe function, getStatus(): ReceiverStatus) and the ReceiverStatus type (mode, connected, lastMessageTimeMs, messageCount, error, endpoint).

Create src/services/receivers/WebSocketDmsReceiver.ts implementing DmsTelemetryReceiver. Default endpoint ws://localhost:8765/dms. JSON parse incoming messages, validate with validateDmsTelemetryMessage, auto-reconnect with exponential backoff (1s/2s/4s/8s up to 30s), keep last valid message, handle malformed messages without crashing, track messageCount and lastMessageTimeMs.

Create src/services/receivers/DummyDmsReceiver.ts implementing DmsTelemetryReceiver. Reuse the 6-state simulation machine logic from src/services/dummyTelemetry.ts (normal/getting_drowsy/drowsy/recovering/phone_check/distracted) with lerp transitions. Emit DmsTelemetryMessage at 10Hz. Map internal states to the new contract format. Mode should be DUMMY.

Create src/services/receivers/ReplayDmsReceiver.ts implementing DmsTelemetryReceiver. Accept array of DmsTelemetryMessage, replay at configurable speed (default 1x), loop or stop at end. Basic implementation is fine.

Create src/services/receivers/createDmsReceiver.ts as factory. Modes: DUMMY, LIVE_WS, REPLAY. Default behavior: attempt LIVE_WS if configured, fallback to DUMMY if WebSocket fails. Use VITE_DMS_WS_URL env var (default ws://localhost:8765/dms).

Create src/services/validation/validateDmsTelemetryMessage.ts. Manual TypeScript runtime checks - no external dependencies. Check required top-level fields (schemaVersion, timestampMs, driverState, headPose, gaze, scores). Return { valid: true } or { valid: false, error: string }.

Create src/services/adapters/dmsTelemetryAdapter.ts with function toDashboardTelemetry(message: DmsTelemetryMessage): DMSTelemetry. Map new contract fields to existing DMSTelemetry type used by UI. Ensure headPose yaw/pitch/roll, gaze x/y/onRoad, confidence.faceDetected/eyesVisible are properly mapped.

Create src/hooks/useDmsTelemetry.ts using the receiver factory. Expose: data (DMSTelemetry | null), receiverStatus (ReceiverStatus), connected (boolean), mode (string), error (string | null). Use RAF-based update pattern from existing useTelemetry.ts. Falls back to dummy if live fails.

Update src/components/Dashboard.tsx to import and use useDmsTelemetry instead of useTelemetry. Keep the same destructured interface so all child components continue working unchanged. The hook should return data in DMSTelemetry format via the adapter.
Create an index barrel file src/services/receivers/index.ts exporting all receiver types and factory.
acceptance_criteria: src/types/dmsTelemetryContract.ts exists with all specified interfaces matching the exact field names and types from the specification
src/services/receivers/DmsTelemetryReceiver.ts defines the interface and ReceiverStatus type
src/services/receivers/WebSocketDmsReceiver.ts implements auto-reconnect WebSocket receiver with validation
src/services/receivers/DummyDmsReceiver.ts reuses the 6-state machine logic and emits at 10Hz
src/services/receivers/createDmsReceiver.ts provides factory with DUMMY/LIVE_WS/REPLAY modes and fallback
src/hooks/useDmsTelemetry.ts provides the hook with fallback behavior
Dashboard.tsx uses the new hook but UI layout remains unchanged
verification: Run npx tsc --noEmit from the project root to verify all TypeScript types are correct
Verify all new files exist in their specified paths
Verify Dashboard.tsx imports useDmsTelemetry and passes data to child components unchanged
findings: Cannot run npx tsc --noEmit due to Node.js proxy-bootstrap.js module error in sandbox environment and no node_modules present. All TypeScript types were manually verified for correctness against the existing codebase patterns. The DummyDmsReceiver uses 0-1 normalized scores internally (matching the wire contract), and the adapter converts to 0-100 range expected by UI components. import.meta.env.VITE_DMS_WS_URL is properly typed via vite/client reference types. Dashboard.tsx change is minimal - only import and hook call updated.
